title: mentha pseudoriganifolia
intro: Mentha pseudoriganifolia, also known as Corsican mint, is a species of mint native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha pseudoriganifolia include relieving headaches and nausea, as well as reducing anxiety and stress levels. Mentha pseudoriganifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for its medicinal uses.
